title: Weight of Water (End Of Times)
description: A coastal community faces impossible choices as a towering tsunami turns survival into a race against time.

title: Shadows Of The Promise
description: A broken promise awakens a presence from the unseen world, forcing two souls confront love, guilt, and consequences beyond death.

title: Reset
description: Trapped in a day, a young man relives the exact same day and tries to break the cycle uncovering what went wrong.

title: Beyond the Veil
description: After death, a female spirit discovers the unseen layers of existence and struggles to reconnect to the world she left behind.

title: Mr Marvelous
description: A boy begins searching for the mysterious hero who once saved his life, only to discover destiny may be closer than he imagined.

title: Fabulous Three
description: Three overlooked students awaken ancient abilities that transform them into unlikely protectors of their city.

title: Direct Current
description: Struck by lightning and changed forever, a student discovers his new power makes him both a target and a protector.

title: Clan-Shift
description: Descendants of ancient clans awaken animal-form spirits tied to identity, heritage and hidden responsibilities.

title: The Miner
description: When the earth begins to fracture, a survivor learns to control the ground and use his new abilities to stop a coming collapse.

title: Rain-bound
description: Strange figures begin appearing only during rainfall, bringing warnings that blur the line between myth and reality.

title: The Dreamers
description: Protectors from a hidden realm enter human dreams to defend sleepers from forces that feed on fear.

title: Us
description: A quiet outsider discovers he is never truly alone when an unseen companion begins influencing his reality.

title: The Hidden Coven
description: A secret circle of witches protects an ancient gateway that should never be opened again.

title: End Of Times
description: A violent tornado tears through a community as survival depends on courage, timing, and impossible decisions.

title: End Of Times: Firefall
description: Meteor fragments ignite the sky as humanity faces a final test beneath a burning horizon.

title: Shadows Of The Promise: Reckoning
description: The consequences of a broken vow return stronger than before as the darkness begins claiming more than memories.
